data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. CONCESSION scored an easy win over 1000m at Gold Coast last time out after racing in behind the speed to the turn. Looks well placed in this line-up to repeat the dose. 7. CABALETTO is racing well this prep and looks close to a winning run following a last start second of eight at Eagle Farm over 1000m as the favourite after racing on the speed from the outset. Faces an easier field here and dropping 5kg in weight can atone. 1. LOST HIS BEANS finished second of eight last start over 1000m at Sunshine Coast after coming home from fifth into the turn. Racing over a longer trip today can go one better. 6. SPEEDY ONE is resuming from a spell and having won fresh-up twice in the past is well worth considering. Should strip fit enough having placed third of seven in a recent 840m trial at Doomben.","runners":[3,7,1,6],"exclusive":true}
